DATAVALUE: Avenida Santa Rosa 11315, La Pintana, Santiago, Chile

Located at the Senda Darwin Biological Station, in a old-growth rainforest. Locally named as Nordpatagonian type of forest. The station is 15 km east of Ancud, in the Chiloé Island, close to the Huicha river.
Avenida Santa Rosa 11315, La Pintana, Santiago, Chile
Ours is a mixed forest but not in the sense of deciduous vs evergreen but in the sense of broadleaf vs conifer trees. They are all evergreen species.
National Commission for Scientific & Technological Research of Chile (grants FONDEQUIP AIC-37, FONDECYT 1130935, FONDECYT 1171239, FONDECYT 1211652)
Avda. Santa Rosa 11315, La Pintana, Santiago, Chile
